expectations.text: Creates SKILL.md with valid YAML frontmatter (name, description, triggers)
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md written with frontmatter including name, description, version, and triggers list

expectations.text: Description includes trigger phrases for auto-invocation
expectations.evidence: Description covers scan, audit, security misconfigurations context — trigger-aware

expectations.text: Instructions cover checking runAsNonRoot, resource limits, and privileged containers
expectations.evidence: Agent summary confirms all three checks covered with severity levels (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM)

expectations.text: Provides a concrete findings report format or template
expectations.evidence: Agent summary confirms 'specifies an exact output format with per-category sections and a summary block'

expectations.text: Mentions the symlink step to make the skill usable
expectations.evidence: No symlink step mentioned in agent summary or response.md — old skill has no creation workflow guiding this step
